tasks.label: Generate Coverage Report
tasks.command: swift test --enable-code-coverage 2>&1 && xcrun llvm-cov report .build/debug/PerformanceDashboardPackageTests.xctest/Contents/MacOS/PerformanceDashboardPackageTests -instr-profile .build/debug/codecov/default.profdata 2>&1 | tee /tmp/coverage.txt
